productDisplayName: Tantra Men No Corruption White Tshirts
description: Composition White round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has white fabric tape on the inseam of the neckline and with graphic print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove immediately Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery With anti-corruption becoming the latest fad, this white t-shirt from tantra will give you the opportunity to tell the world what you stand for. Hold your head up as you walk in this cheeky tee brimming with confidence, and filled with feelings of nationalism mixed with ethical values. Pair it with jeans or shorts for a perfectly casual look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
